titleZh: 中国特点国有企业公司治理结构的形成与发展
titleEn: The Formation and Development of Corporate Governance Structure of SOEs with Chinese Characteristics
abstractZh: 从公司法制度与治理实践角度，讨论了国有企业公司治理结构的发展基础与实践路径。
abstractEn: A long-form legal analysis of SOE governance structure from a Chinese characteristics perspective under the Company Law framework.
